query: Create a simple script that converts Markdown files to HTML
expected_behavior: After detect_tools.sh runs, .advisor/tools.json has cursor set to false and implementer set to claude-sonnet-4-6
Phase 4's Driver runs as Claude Sonnet and generates .advisor/<run-id>/04_impl_notes.md
All four phase artifacts (01_requirements.md, 02_design.md, 03_impl_plan.md, 04_impl_notes.md) exist in .advisor/<run-id>/
All review files are valid JSON and jq '.verdict' succeeds on each
